articles.headline: AI companies are spending millions to thwart this former tech exec’s congressional bid
articles.description: A tech billionaire-backed super PAC is spending $125 million to undercut candidates pushing for AI regulation. New York's Alex Bores, a former tech executive himself, is one of them.

articles.headline: Quit ChatGPT: right now! Your subscription is bankrolling authoritarianism | Rutger Bregman
articles.description: As a historian, I’ve studied the major consumer boycotts of history. We can take down ChatGPT and send a powerful signal to Silicon ValleyOpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, is on track to lose $14bn this year. Its market share is collapsing, and its own CEO, Sam Altman, has admitted it “screwed up” an element of the product. All it takes to accelerate that decline is 10 seconds of your time.A grassroots boycott called QuitGPT has been spreading across the US and beyond, asking people to cancel their ChatGPT subscriptions. More than a million people have answered the call. Mark Ruffalo and Katy Perry have thrown their weight behind it. It is one of the most significant consumer boycotts in recent memory, and I believe it’s time for Europeans to join. Continue reading...

articles.headline: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
articles.description: Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future […]

articles.headline: Physical Intelligence Team Unveils MEM for Robots: A Multi-Scale Memory System Giving Gemma 3-4B VLAs 15-Minute Context for Complex Tasks
articles.description: Current end-to-end robotic policies, specifically Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, typically operate on a single observation or a very short history. This ‘lack of memory’ makes long-horizon tasks, such as cleaning a kitchen or following a complex recipe, computationally intractable or prone to failure. To address this, researchers from Physical Intelligence, Stanford, UC Berkeley, and MIT have […] The post Physical Intelligence Team Unveils MEM for Robots: A Multi-Scale Memory System Giving Gemma 3-4B VLAs 15-Minute Context for Complex Tasks appeared first on MarkTechPost.

articles.headline: Pinterest shares pop 9% as activist Elliott Management takes $1 billion stake
articles.description: Pinterest's stock has plummeted this year as the social media company grapples with slowing growth and advertising competition.

software_engineering.headline: AI Companies Spend Millions to Oppose AI Regulation in Congress
software_engineering.what_changed: A tech billionaire-backed super PAC is spending $125 million to oppose candidates who support AI regulation, including former tech executive Alex Bores.
software_engineering.why_care: This spending could influence future AI legislation, impacting the tools, platforms, and ethical guidelines you work with daily.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Research your local congressional candidates' stances on AI regulation before the next election.

software_engineering.headline: QuitGPT Boycott Gains Momentum, Urging Users to Cancel ChatGPT Subscriptions
software_engineering.what_changed: A grassroots movement, QuitGPT, is urging users to cancel ChatGPT subscriptions, with over a million participants and celebrity endorsements.
software_engineering.why_care: Widespread boycotts can impact the financial stability and development priorities of major AI companies like OpenAI, potentially shifting the tools and services available to you.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Evaluate your reliance on ChatGPT and consider alternative AI tools or open-source solutions this week.

software_engineering.headline: Nvidia Invests $4 Billion in Photonics for Advanced Data Centers
software_engineering.what_changed: Nvidia is investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent to develop photonics technology for data centers, focusing on optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers.
software_engineering.why_care: This investment aims to improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future data centers, directly impacting the performance and cost of cloud infrastructure you utilize.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Monitor Nvidia's progress in photonics and consider how these advancements might affect your future cloud architecture designs.

software_engineering.headline: New Multi-Scale Memory System Gives Robots 15-Minute Context for Complex Tasks
software_engineering.what_changed: Researchers unveiled MEM, a multi-scale memory system that provides Gemma 3-4B Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with 15-minute context for complex robotic tasks.
software_engineering.why_care: This advancement addresses a key limitation in robotics, enabling more complex and long-horizon automated tasks, which could impact future automation in data centers or industrial settings you manage.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Explore the research paper on MEM to understand its architecture and potential applications in your field.

software_engineering.headline: Pinterest Shares Rise 9% as Elliott Management Takes $1 Billion Stake
software_engineering.what_changed: Pinterest's stock increased by 9% after activist investor Elliott Management acquired a $1 billion stake in the company.
software_engineering.why_care: Activist investor involvement can lead to strategic shifts, potentially impacting Pinterest's platform development, API access, or advertising technologies that you might integrate or develop for.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Review Pinterest's recent financial reports and public statements for any indications of upcoming platform changes or strategic shifts.

data_ai.what_changed: Researchers unveiled MEM, a multi-scale memory system that extends the context window of Gemma 3-4B Vision-Language-Action models to 15 minutes for robotic tasks.
data_ai.why_care: This advancement enables robots to handle more complex, long-horizon tasks, which could lead to new applications and research opportunities in robotics and embodied AI.
data_ai.what_to_do: Explore the MEM system's architecture and consider how similar memory solutions could enhance the capabilities of your own long-running AI agents or robotic systems.
